title: Phoneix
description: The Phoneix modpack revolutionizes  Minecraft by adding various new terrain, physics and challenges for you to explore and conquer.
body:
# Get Ready For A World Of Challenges In The Phoneix Modpack!

![This modpack is available on Modrinth.](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)

![This modpack is available for the Fabric modloader.](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg)            ![This modpack is available for the Forge modloader.](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/compact/supported/forge_vector.svg)

Prepare for an unparalleled adventure in Minecraft with the Phoenix Modpack, where the familiar landscapes of blocks and biomes are infused with new depths of challenge and wonder. As you step into this expansive realm, you'll encounter a world shaped by mythical creatures and dynamic weather systems that demand both resilience and creativity.

Explore the vastness of dimensional portals that lead to realms teeming with exotic resources and ancient mysteries waiting to be unraveled. From towering mountains to sprawling plains, each biome offers unique opportunities and dangers, challenging you to adapt and thrive.

Craftsmanship takes on new meaning with an array of tools and materials that allow you to construct everything from fortified strongholds to intricate temples of unparalleled beauty. Master the art of alchemy to brew potions that grant you strength in battle or aid in your exploration of uncharted territories.

But beware—this world is not without its perils. From the fiery depths of volcanic eruptions to the relentless onslaught of mythical beasts like the majestic Phoenix, every corner of this realm holds potential danger and adventure.

Whether you venture forth alone or forge alliances with fellow adventurers in multiplayer servers, the Phoenix Modpack invites you to carve your own path and leave a lasting mark on a landscape where survival is just the beginning. Will you rise from the ashes and embrace the challenges that await, or falter in the face of adversity? The choice is yours in this ever-evolving world of Minecraft.

# Mods & Libraries Featured In This Modpack

**Forge Edition:**
- [**3D Skin Layers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Render the player skin layer in 3d!
- [**Aether Addon: Emissivity**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-emissivity) - An addon for The Aether, adding emissivity to various textures.
- [**Aether Addon: Enhanced Extinguishing**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-enhanced-extinguishing) - Improves the consistency of fire being disallowed in the Aether by adding new extinguished variants of blocks.
- [**Aether Addon: Protect Your Moa**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-protect-your-moa) - An addon centered around equipment for Moas, allowing them to be outfitted with chests and craftable Moa Armor.
- [**Aether Addon: Treasure Reforging**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-treasure-reforging) - Allows dungeon treasure equipment to be smelted down into raw materials, which can be smithed back into other treasure equipment using new templates.
- [**Alex's Caves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) - Explore five new rare cave biomes hidden under the surface of the Overworld...
- [**Alex's Mobs**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) - 85+ New mobs with stylistic quality above the default game.
- [**Alex's Mobs Interaction**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs-interaction) - Adding interactivity between Mobs from Alex's Mobs
- [**Alexs Caves: Stuff & Torpedoes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexscaves-torpedoes) - 💥Adds torpedoes and equipment related to Alex's Caves
- [**Animation Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/animationoverhaul) - Smooth and interactive animations. Customizable and compatible!
- [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements
- [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods.
- [**Auto HUD**](https://modrinth.com/mod/autohud) - A mod which dynamically hides parts of the user interface
- [**BUBUSTEIN's Money Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bubustein-money) - Ever wish Minecraft had a money mod with banknotes, coins, and cash? Search no further!
- [**Better Combat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) - ⚔️ Easy, spectacular and fun melee combat system from Minecraft Dungeons.
- [**Biomes O' Plenty**](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) - Adds 50+ unique biomes to enhance your world, with new trees, flowers, and more!
- [**Blocks Without Limits**](https://modrinth.com/mod/blocks-without-limits) - BWL: Blocks without limits - a mod that unlocks endless creative possibilities in Minecraft. It adds high-resolution decorative blocks, making your world even more beautiful and realistic.
- [**Camera Overhaul Reforged**](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-overhaul-reforged) - Makes gameplay more satisfying through the use of various camera tilting. Configurable.
- [**Citadel**](https://modrinth.com/mod/citadel) - A Lightweight Library
- [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [**Collective**](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) - 🎓 Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods.
- [**Curios API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) - A flexible and expandable accessory/equipment API for users and developers.
- [**Danger Close**](https://modrinth.com/mod/danger-close) - Torches, campfires, and stonecutters will now deal damage to players, animals, or enemies that run over or brush against them. Basically, now the games will be more realistic, since just like in real life, these items will do a little damage.
- [**Deeper Oceans**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeper-oceans) - Oceans, but 3x as deep!
- [**Deeper and Darker**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) - A Minecraft 1.19+ mod which features more blocks, items, armors, and hidden mysteries to complement the new Deep Dark biome. Our website: https://kyanitemods.dev
- [**Diagonal Fences**](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-fences) - Fences connecting diagonally? Wait. That's illegal.
- [**Diagonal Walls**](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-walls) - The missing diagonal blocks are here! After all these years. Finally, you have them all.
- [**Diagonal Windows**](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-windows) - Now windows are connecting diagonally, too?! This is getting out of hand!
- [**Dungeons and Taverns**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns) - A Structure Datapack adding dungeons, taverns and other structures to find while you explore the world.
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Ancient City Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-ancient-city-overhaul) - Standalone Splinter version of Dungeons and Taverns Ancient City Overhaul
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Pillager Outpost Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-pillager-outpost-overhaul) - Standalone split version of the Pillager Outpost Overhaul from Dungeons and Taverns
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Stronghold Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-stronghold-overhaul) - This Datapack, the Standalone version of Dungeons and Taverns Overhaul of the Stronghold, Overhauls the Stronghold from the ground up With 417 Different rooms and 5 sub stronghold types
Fair warning, your world will Freeze Upon first Structure generation.
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Swamp Hut Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-swamp-hut-overhaul) - This Splinter Standalone version of Dungeons and Tavern adds the Swamp Hut rework. Adding 2 variants, an loot chest, an brewing stand and an bed
- [**Dynamic Crosshair**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - A mod that hides or changes the crosshair dependent on context
- [**Dynamic Lights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-lights) - Supported entities and items such as torches or lanterns emit light! Server-side only!
- [**Echo Chest**](https://modrinth.com/mod/echo-chest) - A unique chest that collects all items dropped nearby. Very useful!
- [**Elemental Creepers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-creepers) - The original Elemental Creepers, finally updated! Adds 15 new kinds of creeper, some friendly/harmless while some _very_ deadly
- [**Embeddium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) - A performance-enhancing client mod (based on Sodium) prioritizing reliability & mod compatibility
- [**Ender Dragon Fight Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/edf-remastered) - An up in difficulty for Minecraft's final boss.
With more health and more attacks, the fight finally feels like the final confrontation.
- [**Enhanced**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedd) - Enhances vanilla gameplay by adding a lot of recipes and loot table changes
- [**Falling Leaves (NeoForge/Forge)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleavesforge) - Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks 
- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
- [**Fire Arrows Ignite Fire**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fire-arrows-ignite-fire) - A fire arrow can set a block on fire
- [**First-person Model**](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) - Enables the third-person Model in first-person
- [**Food Expansion: Reimagined**](https://modrinth.com/mod/food-expansion-reimagined) - Simple Mod, which adds new Food into the game. Now for newer versions!
- [**Geckolib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - A 3D animation library for entities, blocks, items, armor, and more!
- [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geophilic) - A subtle overhaul of vanilla Overworld biomes.
- [**GraveStone Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-mod) - Places a gravestone with your inventory items inside when you die
- [**HT's TreeChop**](https://modrinth.com/mod/treechop) - Take down trees chop-by-chop instead of block-by-block.
- [**Hang Glider**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider) - Soar through the skies and explore the world's beauty with your brand-new hang glider!
- [**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
- [**Immersive Aircraft**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) - A bunch of rustic aircraft to travel, transport, and explore!
- [**Immersive Caves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-caves) - A Vanilla+ mod that adds 15+ new climate/biome based Cave Types
- [**Incendium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium) - A nether biome overhaul combined with challenging structures to conquer, unique weapons to obtain, and tricky mobs to defeat.
- [**Jade 🔍**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - Shows information about what you are looking at. (Hwyla/Waila fork for Minecraft 1.16+)
- [**Kotlin for Forge**](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) - Adds a Kotlin language loader and provides some optional utilities.
- [**Make Bubbles Pop**](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) - Client-side mod that makes bubble particles pop and lets them rise realistically to the water surface.
- [**Memory Leak Fix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server
- [**Metabolism**](https://modrinth.com/mod/metabolism) - Temperature, Health, Thirst, Hunger as a cohesive, interconnected system
- [**MidnightLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) - Common library with a built-in configuration system
- [**Mine Treasure**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-treasure) - An expansive mining data pack. Adds a probability of obtaining treasures from mining. 100+ custom items, 80+ loot tables, 200+ achievements and much more!
- [**MonoLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/monolib) - A mod development library to ease the creation of new mods.
- [**Moonlight Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) - dynamic data pack and registration, villager activities, custom map marker and a lot more
- [**More Chests Variants (MCV)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion) - Chests for all the different woods
- [**More Chests Variants - Biomes O' Plenty**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcv-biomes-o-plenty) - Chests for all the Biomes O' Plenty woods
- [**Mutant Monsters**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) - The mutants are back! Face scary creatures and powerful beasts like never before.
- [**Naturalist**](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) - Adds new immersive wildlife with realistic behavior!
- [**Naturality**](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturality-mod) - This mod adds biomes, trees, mobs and more!
- [**Necronomicon API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/necronomicon) - A personal utility library for my mods.
- [**Not Enough Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person
- [**Nyf's Quivers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-quivers) - Adds 5 levels of Quivers to the Game that can be configured.
- [**Nyf's Spiders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders) - Modifes spiders to be more realistic
- [**Oculus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) - Unofficial Fork of "Iris", made to work with FML
- [**Panda's Extra Details**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pandas-extra-details) - A mod that adds extra Details to Minecraft for both Forge and Fabric
- [**Panda's Falling Tree's**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pandas-falling-trees) - Make trees fall when cut down
- [**PandaLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pandalib) - A Library mod used by The Panda Oliver
- [**Pure Ores**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pureores) - Adds more ores to the game, giving you many options for awesome looking gear and blocks!
- [**Puzzles Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - Why's it called Puzzles you ask? That's the puzzle!
- [**Quad**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) - Tags, more of them, giving the power to the player in a vanilla style
- [**Realistic Bees**](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-bees) - 🐝 Tiny bees, or big! Bigger group spawns, increased hive space, stinger functionality and more.
- [**Realistic Block Physics**](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-block-physics) - A realistic overhaul of Minecraft's building mechanics.
- [**Realistic Explosion Physics**](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-explosion-physics) - A realistic overhaul of Minecraft's explosion mechanics.
- [**Realistic Physics**](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-physics) - A library mod containing core functionality needed for xBigEllx's Realistic Block Physics mod.
- [**Remove Terralith Intro Message**](https://modrinth.com/mod/remove-terralith-intro-message) - A datapack/mod to remove the intro message that appears with Terralith.
- [**Roughly Enough Items (REI)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) - Clean and Customizable. Alternative to Just Enough Items/JEI.
- [**Serene Seasons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) - Seasons with changing colors, shifting temperatures, and more!
- [**Simple Hats**](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hats) - Simple Hats is an expandable cosmetic hat mod that allows users to define their own hats with options such as variants, dyes, particle effects, and seasons.
- [**Sound Physics Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.
- [**Spawn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod) - An animal mod that tries to add new animals with niches and personality to the Minecraft world
- [**Spawn Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-animations) - Hostile mobs dig out of the ground or poof into existence when they spawn!
- [**Spoiled**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spoiled) - Spoiling your food supply since 2020
- [**Stoneworks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) - Vanilla stone types in plenty of variations for all your building needs.
- [**Supplementaries**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - Vanilla+ additions: Jars, signposts, faucets, weather vanes spring launchers, sconces, planters, lights, decoration and automation
- [**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tectonic) - Massively altered world generation with mountain ranges, underground rivers and more!
- [**TerraBlender**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) - A library mod for adding biomes in a simple and compatible manner!
- [**Terralith**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - Explore almost 100 new biomes consisting of both realism and light fantasy, using just Vanilla blocks. Complete with several immersive structures to compliment the overhauled terrain.
- [**Texture of Paul90317's Datapacks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/texture-of-paul90317s-datapacks) - add the textures of custom items in my data packs.
- [**The Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) - The Aether Team presents the original Aether mod! Maintained and kept up to date for modern versions of Minecraft and fully compatible with multiplayer!
- [**The Bumblezone - NeoForge/Forge**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone) - An unBEElievable dimension full of bees that becomes REALLY angry if you take their honey!
- [**Thin Air**](https://modrinth.com/mod/thin-air) - The air is not always breathable in the depths of the earth and other dimensions.
- [**Tidal Towns**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tidal-towns) - Several pieces of driftwood have been gathered to form a village that floats on the waves.
- [**Time Control**](https://modrinth.com/mod/time-control) - Want longer or shorter in-game days/nights? So did I.
- [**True Darkness [Forge] - Updated Fork**](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-darkness-forge-updated-fork) - An unofficial fork of the 'True Darkness' mod for 1.20.1 Forge
- [**Ultris: Boss Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ultris) - Explore 8 new and exciting bosses to take on across your world, with new structures, items, and stories for you to unravel.
- [**Upgradable Backpack**](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgradable-backpack) - dyeable, renamable, and upgradeable backpacks (9-slots, 18-slots, 26-slots)
- [**Valkyrien Skies**](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) - Physics in Minecraft
- [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. Lets you create waypoints which help you find the locations you've marked.
- [**YUNG's API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api) - Library mod for YUNG's mods.
- [**YUNG's Better Desert Temples**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's desert temples!
- [**YUNG's Better Dungeons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's dungeons!
- [**YUNG's Better End Island**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island) - An overhaul of the main End Island where the dragon fight takes place!
- [**YUNG's Better Jungle Temples**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's jungle temples!
- [**YUNG's Better Mineshafts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts) - A long-awaited and much-needed abandoned mineshaft overhaul!
- [**YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's Nether fortresses!
- [**YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's ocean monuments!
- [**YUNG's Better Strongholds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's strongholds!
- [**YUNG's Bridges**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-bridges) - Adds beautiful naturally generated bridges throughout the world!
- [**YetAnotherConfigLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.
- [**You Thief: Remastered Edition**](https://modrinth.com/mod/you-thief-remastered-edition) - Make villagers angry when their chests are opened by players, for those who like fun, immersive experience, challenge, and ARPG elements.
- [**playerAnimator**](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) - animate the player

**Fabric Edition:**
- [**3D Skin Layers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Render the player skin layer in 3d!
- [**Animation Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/animationoverhaul) - Smooth and interactive animations. Customizable and compatible!
- [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements
- [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods.
- [**Auto HUD**](https://modrinth.com/mod/autohud) - A mod which dynamically hides parts of the user interface
- [**AutoTag**](https://modrinth.com/mod/autotag) - Automatically populates some item, block and other tags (for mod compatibility)
- [**BUBUSTEIN's Money Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bubustein-money) - Ever wish Minecraft had a money mod with banknotes, coins, and cash? Search no further!
- [**Better Combat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) - ⚔️ Easy, spectacular and fun melee combat system from Minecraft Dungeons.
- [**Body Health System**](https://modrinth.com/mod/body-health-system) - A new health system for Minecraft
- [**Boids**](https://modrinth.com/mod/boids) - Boids simulation for flocking fish 🐟
- [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [**Collective**](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) - 🎓 Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods.
- [**Continuity**](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures
- [**Danger Close**](https://modrinth.com/mod/danger-close) - Torches, campfires, and stonecutters will now deal damage to players, animals, or enemies that run over or brush against them. Basically, now the games will be more realistic, since just like in real life, these items will do a little damage.
- [**Deeper Oceans**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeper-oceans) - Oceans, but 3x as deep!
- [**Deeper and Darker**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) - A Minecraft 1.19+ mod which features more blocks, items, armors, and hidden mysteries to complement the new Deep Dark biome. Our website: https://kyanitemods.dev
- [**Diagonal Fences**](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-fences) - Fences connecting diagonally? Wait. That's illegal.
- [**Diagonal Walls**](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-walls) - The missing diagonal blocks are here! After all these years. Finally, you have them all.
- [**Diagonal Windows**](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-windows) - Now windows are connecting diagonally, too?! This is getting out of hand!
- [**Dungeons and Taverns**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns) - A Structure Datapack adding dungeons, taverns and other structures to find while you explore the world.
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Ancient City Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-ancient-city-overhaul) - Standalone Splinter version of Dungeons and Taverns Ancient City Overhaul
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Pillager Outpost Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-pillager-outpost-overhaul) - Standalone split version of the Pillager Outpost Overhaul from Dungeons and Taverns
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Stronghold Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-stronghold-overhaul) - This Datapack, the Standalone version of Dungeons and Taverns Overhaul of the Stronghold, Overhauls the Stronghold from the ground up With 417 Different rooms and 5 sub stronghold types
Fair warning, your world will Freeze Upon first Structure generation.
- [**Dungeons and Taverns Swamp Hut Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-swamp-hut-overhaul) - This Splinter Standalone version of Dungeons and Tavern adds the Swamp Hut rework. Adding 2 variants, an loot chest, an brewing stand and an bed
- [**Dynamic Crosshair**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - A mod that hides or changes the crosshair dependent on context
- [**Dynamic Lights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-lights) - Supported entities and items such as torches or lanterns emit light! Server-side only!
- [**Echo Chest**](https://modrinth.com/mod/echo-chest) - A unique chest that collects all items dropped nearby. Very useful!
- [**Embeddium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) - A performance-enhancing client mod (based on Sodium) prioritizing reliability & mod compatibility
- [**Ender Dragon Fight Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/edf-remastered) - An up in difficulty for Minecraft's final boss.
With more health and more attacks, the fight finally feels like the final confrontation.
- [**Enhanced**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedd) - Enhances vanilla gameplay by adding a lot of recipes and loot table changes
- [**EnvironmentZ**](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmentz) - Harder environmentz
- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.
- [**Fabric Language Kotlin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.
- [**Fabric Seasons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons) - A simple mod that adds seasons to the game, dynamically changing biomes as you play.
- [**Fabric Seasons: Croptopia Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-croptopia-compat) - Croptopia compatibility for Fabric Seasons
- [**Fabric Seasons: Delight Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-delight-compat) - Farmer's Delight compatibility for Fabric Seasons
- [**Fabric Seasons: Extras**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-extras) - Custom blocks and items to make your Fabric Seasons experience better.
- [**Fabric Seasons: Terraformers Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-terraformers-compat) - Traverse and Terrestria compatibility for Fabric Seasons
- [**Fabric Seasons: Terralith Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-terralith-compat) - Terralith compatibility for Fabric Seasons
- [**Farmer's Delight Refabricated**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) - Modern Fabric port of the cooking and farming mod, "Farmer's Delight"
- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
- [**Fire Arrows Ignite Fire**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fire-arrows-ignite-fire) - A fire arrow can set a block on fire
- [**First-person Model**](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) - Enables the third-person Model in first-person
- [**Geckolib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - A 3D animation library for entities, blocks, items, armor, and more!

## Thanks
A huge thanks to the mod developers whose mods are featured in this modpack. If you have any issues with your mod being used in Phoneix, feel free to contact Modrinth about this and I will happily resolve it for you :).

## Important Note
You need to have a mid-range to powerful PC with OpenGL 4.0 minimum to run this modpack, otherwise it will likely crash during the world generation. An RTX graphics card capable of ray-tracing with 8GBs of VRAM or higher is also reccomended.
